name: ribosome-schema-repo
description: Repo-root orchestration only — not published. The publishable artifact is bindings/typescript (@medullaflow/ribosome-schema). No npm workspaces: this repo has exactly one language binding today, and the schema itself (schema/v1/, conformance/) is plain, dependency-free JSON, consumable without bun/npm at all.

scripts.build: bun run spec:types && bun run bindings:install && cd bindings/typescript && bun run build
